title: Release node
description: The exported release-package record for an artifact. Carried in a release.exported event under payload.node. A release presupposes a prior human approval event and passing checks; this node does not itself authorize release. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive.

id.description: Node ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. release:association-board-brief-001:rel001.

channel.description: Where the package was released, e.g. board_portal.

package_ref.description: Path or identifier of the exported release package.

approval_ref.description: Node ID of the approval that authorized this release.

file_digests.description: Optional map of packaged file path to SHA-256 digest. Recorded as a CONVENIENCE for change detection, NOT as an integrity control or chain of custody: the event log is plaintext and editable in v0.1 (see AGENTS.md integrity scope, D2/D6).
